title: Complete a topic and unlock downstream topics
description: An authenticated learner can mark a topic complete and see locked downstream topics become available in the curriculum graph.

steps.description: Select an existing learning path from the sidebar
Select a locked or available prerequisite topic node in the curriculum graph
Verify downstream topics become unlocked in the curriculum graph

title: Access the main learning interface after signing in
description: An authenticated learner can sign in from the landing page and reach the main learning interface.

steps.description: Verify the main learning interface is displayed

title: Open a topic node to see its details
description: An authenticated learner can select a topic node in the curriculum graph and view the node's details panel.

steps.description: Select an existing learning path from the sidebar
Select a topic node in the curriculum graph
Verify the selected node details are displayed

title: Select an existing learning path from the sidebar
description: An authenticated learner can choose a prior learning path from the sidebar and see that path's curriculum content load.

steps.description: Select an existing learning path from the sidebar
Verify the corresponding curriculum graph is displayed
Verify the selected path details are displayed

title: Answer a topic question and see a passing result
description: Verifies that a learner can submit an answer to an evaluation question and receive passing feedback when the response is correct.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a topic node with an evaluation question
Enter a correct answer in the response field
Verify passing evaluation feedback is displayed

title: Create a new learning path from a goal
description: An authenticated learner can open the new path flow, submit a learning goal, and start a new personalized learning path.

steps.description: Enter a learning goal into the goal field
Verify a new learning path is initialized

title: Generate resources for a pending topic
description: An authenticated learner can open a pending topic and generate curated resources for it.

steps.description: Select an existing learning path from the sidebar
Select a pending topic node in the curriculum graph
Generate resources for the selected topic

title: Pan and zoom the curriculum graph
description: An authenticated learner can explore the curriculum graph by panning and zooming without losing access to the path view.

steps.description: Select an existing learning path from the sidebar
Verify the curriculum graph remains displayed

title: Open a new learning path from a goal
description: Verifies that an authenticated learner can create a new personalized curriculum graph from a learning goal and begin the first available topic.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a personalized curriculum graph is displayed
Verify the first available topic is accessible

title: Answer a topic evaluation question and see feedback
description: An authenticated learner can answer a topic evaluation question and receive pass or fail feedback in the learning interface.

steps.description: Select an existing learning path from the sidebar
Select a topic node in the curriculum graph

title: View cached resources for an available topic
description: Verifies that a learner can open a topic that already has cached resources and review the resource list.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a topic node with cached resources
Verify the resource list is available

title: Review previously created learning paths
description: An authenticated learner can view their saved learning paths in path history and recognize available past journeys.

steps.description: Verify the path history list is displayed

title: Resume a past learning path from history
description: Verifies that a returning learner can open a previous path from history and continue with the next unlocked topic.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the selected learning path is displayed
Verify the next unlocked topic is available

title: Open an external resource link from a topic
description: Verifies that a learner can open a curated resource link from a selected topic.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a topic node with cached resources
Open one of the external resource links

title: Open a curated external resource from a topic
description: An authenticated learner can open a cached external resource link from a topic and return to the learning view with the resource preserved.

steps.description: Select an existing learning path from the sidebar
Select a topic node in the curriculum graph
Verify the resource content is displayed

title: Switch between learning path histories and selected nodes
description: Verifies that a learner can move between different past paths and keep the curriculum graph and node details in sync with the selection.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the displayed curriculum graph updates to the newly selected path
Verify the selected node details match the current path

title: Answer a topic question and see a failing result
description: Verifies that a learner can submit an incomplete or incorrect answer and receive failing evaluation feedback.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Select a topic node with an evaluation question
Enter an incomplete answer in the response field
Verify failing evaluation feedback is displayed

title: Switch between sign in and sign up views
description: A learner can toggle between sign in and sign up modes on the authentication screen and see the form update accordingly.

steps.description: Toggle to the sign up view
Verify the sign up form is displayed
Toggle back to the sign in view
Verify the sign in form is displayed
